env._comment_alias_pins: --- ALIAS PINS: what opus/sonnet/haiku aliases resolve to. Must be full model names. Append [1m] for extended context. ---
env._comment_custom_model: --- CUSTOM MODEL: adds one extra entry to /model picker (for gateway/proxy models) ---
env.ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_MODEL_OPTION_DESCRIPTIO: Custom model routed through LiteLLM proxy
env._comment_subagent: --- SUBAGENT MODEL: what spawned agents use ---
env._comment_global_model: --- GLOBAL MODEL OVERRIDE: highest priority, overrides everything ---
env._comment_effort_env: --- EFFORT: env var overrides all other effort settings ---
env._comment_context: --- CONTEXT WINDOW: set to 1 to disable 1M context entirely ---
env._comment_thinking: --- THINKING: set to 1 to disable adaptive thinking, revert to fixed budget ---
env._comment_caching: --- PROMPT CACHING: set to 1 to disable ---
